github.copilot.chat.commitMessageGenerat.text:
Follow Conventional Commits: '<type>(scope): short summary in imperative mood>'

Body: Provide a concise summary of the major changes using bullet points. Group related changes together into high-level points rather than listing every individual file. Focus on the 'WHY' and the 'IMPACT' of the logic. Each bullet point must end with a single, contextually appropriate emoji. Keep descriptions punchy and professional.

Footer: Include optional breaking changes or issue references.
